name: consent_capture
description: Red 'Collect Consent' action button in the patient chart header, shown only for patients without the configured consent on file. Opens a scripted consent modal; on Accept, records the consent via the Canvas FHIR API (accepted + effective today, never expires) with a generated PDF documenting the collecting staff member.

protocols.description: Red action button in the patient chart header that opens the consent modal when the patient has no accepted consent of the configured code.
Endpoint that records the accepted consent via the Canvas FHIR API with a generated documentation PDF.
